description: CompositionWhite round neck T-shirt in 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the chestFitRegular Wash careMachine wash in warm water with like colours onlyBleach using a non-chlorine base only when neededTumble dry lowDo not dry clean or iron if decoratedFor all you jimi hendrix fans out there, here's that T-shirt you've been waiting for. Bring back to life this pathbreaking electric guitarist with this cotton tee. Pair it with denims or leather pants and lifestyle suede or canvas shoes available in a wide range at myntra for that cool, rockstar look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
